type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
1) An updated plan was created for particulates in 2018.  The listing of emissions equipment was updated and calculated using the most recent emission calculation information.
2) The reason for the updated plan in 2018 was due to the addition of a cogeneration plant that was built in 2017 and fully operational in 2018
